message:
fix: prefer gastown repo over crew rigs in stale binary check (#1680)

GetRepoRoot() was finding crew rigs (which also have cmd/gt/main.go)
instead of the canonical gastown repo, causing false stale warnings
because crew rig HEADs differ from the binary build commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
